```json
  "decision": "fail",

  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Breaker ampacity exceeds conductor ampacity, creating an overcurrent protection mismatch.",
    "Conductor insulation and termination temperature ratings not verified against breaker load and fault conditions per 110.14(C).",
    "Potential for conductor overheating, insulation damage, and fire hazard under overload conditions.",
    "Lack of coordination between overcurrent device and downstream conductor protection."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace or resize the overcurrent protective device to be equal to or less than conductor ampacity per NEC 240.4.",
    "Verify conductor temperature rating and termination ratings per NEC 110.14(C).",
    "Recalculate load and fault coordination; ensure breaker protects conductor per NEC 240.",
    "Re-inspect and re-test the circuit before energizing.",
    "Update as-built drawings and submittals to reflect corrected breaker and conductor coordination."
  ],
  "rationale": "A breaker/conductor ampacity mismatch violates NEC 240 overcurrent protection requirements and creates a high risk of conductor overheating and fire. The installation is non-compliant and must be corrected before acceptance.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 240 - Overcurrent Protection",
    "NEC 110.14(C) - Termination Temperature Ratings",
    "NEC 210.8 - Ground-Fault Circuit-Interrupter Protection",
    "NEC 210.12 - Arc-Fault Circuit-Interrupter Protection"
  ]
}
```
